name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Altamonte Springs, FL's 5 Star Car Title Loans location at 801 W St Rd 436 Suite 2179 offers quick title loans and payday advances Monday through Saturday.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans in Altamonte Springs, FL operates at 801 W St Rd 436 Suite 2179, a standalone storefront serving Central Florida residents in need of quick cash. The Altamonte Springs location is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, Saturday 10AM to 5PM, and closed Sundays. This convenient location makes it accessible for working hours and weekend financing needs.

At this Altamonte Springs branch, you can apply for title loans secured by your vehicle or payday loans for immediate cash needs. The team here specializes in quick approval processes and works with borrowers who need funds fast. Call 407-214-3409 to discuss your options and get pre-qualification information before visiting.

If you're an Altamonte Springs resident considering a title or payday loan, bring your photo ID, proof of income, and vehicle information if applying for a title loan. 5 Star Car Title Loans focuses on providing accessible lending solutions for those facing short-term cash needs.
address: 801 W St Rd 436 Suite 2179, Altamonte Springs, FL 32714

company_info.headquarters: 801 W St Rd 436 Suite 2179, Altamonte Springs, FL 32714

pros: Operating since 2012 with 255,000+ loans funded — established track record
Borrower keeps and drives the vehicle throughout the loan term
Same-day funding available for approved applicants
Loan amounts up to $50,000 based on vehicle equity
No prepayment penalties — pay off early without additional cost
Licensed and regulated lender with advertised transparent terms and no hidden fees
Accepts motorcycles and semi-trucks as collateral, not only passenger vehicles
cons: No APR or interest rate information displayed on the website — costs unknown before applying
Title loan default risk: vehicle can be repossessed if the loan is not repaid
Only 11 published reviews despite claiming 255,000+ loans funded — very thin public feedback
Geographic coverage limited to approximately 18 states — unavailable in many US states
No mention of credit counseling, hardship programs, or alternatives for struggling borrowers
best_for: Vehicle owners with sufficient equity who need fast cash and have poor or no credit
Borrowers facing same-day financial emergencies (rent, bills, medical) who own a paid-off or low-balance vehicle
People needing larger emergency amounts ($5,000–$50,000) who cannot qualify for unsecured personal loans
Residents of one of the ~18 states where 5 Star has licensed locations
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best for vehicle owners with poor credit who need fast cash and have no lower-cost borrowing options available. The main caveat is that APR and fee details are not disclosed on the website, and title loans as a product class carry high interest costs and the risk of losing your vehicle if you default.
services: Car title loans (secured by vehicle title, borrower keeps car)
Installment loans (fixed payments, up to 24-month terms)
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 801 W St Rd 436 Suite 2179, Altamonte Springs, FL. Fast title loans available.
